title: Prepare the content model for additional certification tracks

acceptance_criteria.text: Remove vendor coupling that would misrepresent additional (non-CompTIA) tracks, so shared UI is driven by the manifest rather than hardcoded track names.
Harden manifest validation for new-track safety: idPrefix must be unique across tracks (content ids are namespaced by prefix).
Document how to add a track for any vendor (not just CompTIA).
Authoring/advertising the first actual additional track is milestone 303's scope, not this preparation item.
